title: AZB & Partners acts for Max Healthcare in ₹300 Crore Kalinga Hospital acquisition
description: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has acquired 58.4% stake in Kalinga Hospital Limited for ₹300 crore.AZB & Partners advised its long-standing client Max Healthcare Institute on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Niladri Maulik (Partner), Malini Raju (Partner), Prashant Khurana (Senior Associate) and Prannathi Ajith Kumar (Senior Associate).Kalinga Hospital is a multi super specialty hospital located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India.
